design_rationale.general_hypothesis: Endpoint success licenses candidate-artifact credit only when a frozen candidate-to-uptake-to-action-to-check chain is observed; mediator-conditioned selection and false-positive cost must remain separate estimands.
design_rationale.uncertainty_clarified: Whether existing projection, configured-system, metric, and validity boundaries can expose mediated attribution and selection failures without a domain-specific schema.
design_rationale.useful_completion: Five planted cross-domain cases are detected for their declared reason, all funnel denominators remain visible, false-positive and collateral costs cannot be compensated by positive checks, and a ranking reversal across mediators is reported rather than pooled away.

contract_reuse.role: configured-system, artifact-view, trace, and check vocabulary
eligible population, missingness, denominator, and aggregation boundary
claim ceiling and excluded interpretation boundary

provenance.locator: Unique insight; Transferable design patterns; Concrete changes for skill-bench

claim_limits.supported: The deterministic replay detects the five planted mediated-attribution and selection failure signatures in these frozen builder-authored records.
